title: Luxury Hen Party Sashes - Pink Satin Ribbon with Black and Silver Holographic Script Font (Bridesmaid)
features: Time to celebrate your special event with this CLASSY and STYLISH sash you can't go wrong.
We hand make these sashes in the UK with only the most amazing QUALITY holo vinyl and SATIN ribbon.
We provide velcro that you attach yourself so this will be the perfect fit, we don't scrimp on ribbon and our ribbon is 10cm wide and 170cm long.

Hen Party Sashes Available - Bride To Be, Bridesmaid, Brides Mum, Brides Nan. Brides Sister, Grooms Mum, Grooms Sister, Grooms Nan, Team Bride, Hen Party,. Mother of the Bride, Mother of the Groom, Brides Friend, Brides Aunt, Grooms Friend, Grooms AuntMaid of Honour and Custom Sash - Please see out other listings (can't find what you need them drop us a message).
